title: Document workflow invariants
goal: Capture the daemon workflow invariants that must remain stable during v0.1.0 release-polish refactors, especially run lifetime, slice ordering, worker attempts, cancellation, progress, artifacts, and release gates.
acceptance: Add a concise docs/workflow-invariants.md that records the behavior-preserving invariants for daemon-owned runs before extracting workflow seams.
Document run lifetime versus Pi/tool/session lifetime, including the rule that no hidden global workflow timeout exists by default.
Document slice lifecycle invariants: dependency order, worker worktrees, worker commits before merge, serial integration merges, checkpoints after successful merges, and repair-before-gate behavior.

Document worker attempt supervision invariants: attempt history, at-least-once semantics, process liveness distinct from output activity, quiet-worker warnings as advisory, and explicit attempt timeout policy.
Document cancellation, verification/gate timeouts, progress/status/monitor state ownership, artifact/handoff behavior, and release/tag safety in terms future refactors can test against.
Link the invariants document from user-facing or contributor-facing docs without changing CLI/daemon behavior.
must_ask_if: The implementation would change any CLI, daemon status JSON, monitor, handoff, or artifact contract.
The implementation would add or imply a hidden global workflow timeout.
The implementation would weaken the rule that handoff does not mutate remotes unless explicitly requested.
